steps.t: Noxious cauldrons can be found across Azgh-buzru, especially among siege installations. Dréri has asked you to destroy noxious cauldrons at Azgh-buzru…
Dréri can be found at Drenghól in the War of Three Peaks. You have destroyed many noxious cauldrons at Azgh-buzru and impaired Gorgar's usage of this …
